series_metadata.series_description: The Supporting Documentation of Purchase Requisitions are records created when initiating the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisfy claims and expedite payments for private service providers including copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: onsite current fiscal year, 3 previous years, oldest year offsite storage, offsite, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and ; Electronic: 6 years, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and
